name: taskflow
description: Hierarchical task orchestration MCP plugin for Claude Code with agent delegation, continuous delivery, and verification

module_boundaries: src/models.py — domain models (Task, TaskStatus) — leaf dependency, no imports
src/verification.py — state transition logic — pure functions, depends only on models
src/tree.py — tree rendering/presentation — pure functions, depends only on models
src/workflows.py — workflow type definitions — standalone, no internal imports
src/db.py — SQLite persistence layer — depends on models, all I/O lives here
src/server.py — MCP transport layer — orchestrates db + verification + workflows
architecture.notes: server.py is the sole cross-layer orchestrator. Domain modules (verification, tree, workflows) have zero cross-dependencies. server.py imports render_subtree and render_tree from tree.py for task display.

conventions.docstring_style: minimal imperative one-liners; Google-style Args: only in server.py MCP tools
conventions.import_style: relative within src (from .models import), absolute in tests (from src.db import)
conventions.error_handling: exceptions for domain rules (TransitionError, ValueError); string-encoded errors at MCP boundary (error:reason)
conventions.type_annotations: full on function signatures, modern union syntax (str | None)
conventions.data_modeling: dataclasses for domain models, StrEnum for status, plain dicts for compute_* return values

ci_cd.caching: uv cache via astral-sh/setup-uv@v4 keyed on uv.lock

containerization.notes: MCP stdio server — no ports exposed. Data dir at /app/data requires volume mount for persistence.

api.auth: none (inherits OS-level process security from MCP host)

key_files.src/db.py: SQLite persistence layer — CRUD + current task tracking
key_files.src/models.py: Domain models — Task dataclass, TaskStatus StrEnum
key_files.src/verification.py: State transition validation — finite state machine
key_files.src/workflows.py: Workflow type definitions — 10 workflow types with agent assignments
key_files.src/tree.py: Task tree rendering — icons, labels, nested display
key_files.src/hooks.py: Workflow lifecycle hooks — event-driven automation callbacks
key_files.src/analytics.py: Task analytics — query engine for workflow metrics and insights
key_files.src/workflow_loader.py: Custom workflow loader — YAML-based workflow template loading
key_files.src/migrations.py: Database migrations — schema versioning and upgrade logic
key_files.schemas/project-profile.json: JSON schema for this profile file
key_files.skills/languages/*.md: Language standards for Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go
